series_metadata.series_title: Corrections and Habeas Corpus Litigation Files
series_metadata.series_description: Corrections and Habeas Corpus cases are brought in state and federal courts. Case files track the work of the office to oppose litigation brought by inmates seeking to oppose prison conditions (Corrections) or prison sentences (Habeas Corpus). Records include, but may not be limited to, pleadings, exhibits, court orders, decisions, petition, case-related correspondence, discovery, and deposition transcripts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from case closing. ; Paper: from case closing, unless scanned and saved electronically
